nasb.text: Like the overthrow of Sodom and Gomorrah with its neighbors,” says the Lord, “no one will live there, nor will a son of man reside in it.

esv.text: As when Sodom and Gomorrah and their neighboring cities were overthrown, says the Lord, no man shall dwell there, no man shall sojourn in her.

cnv.text: 以東必傾覆，像所多瑪、蛾摩拉，和它們的城鎮一樣，必沒有人住在那裡，也必沒有人在那裡寄居。

ccb.text: 那里要像所多玛、蛾摩拉及其周围的村镇一样被毁灭，荒无人烟。这是耶和华说的。
